proposed_artifacts.content:
## Termination Date Verification for NAP-SRC-0020

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0020 (WhatsApp Image 2026-04-28)
**OCR Confidence:** 0.65

### Finding
The Notice to Quit states the tenancy is terminated 'as at 1.' but the full date is not legible in the OCR output. The extracted text reads: 'the said Court of Edinburgh Napier University holds the Tenancy Agreement as terminated as at 1.'

### Recommendation
Obtain a higher-quality image or manually review the original JPEG to determine the complete termination date. Consider re-extracting with a different OCR engine or human transcription.
proposed_artifacts.title: Termination Date Verification Result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Manually review the original image NAP-SRC-0020 (WhatsApp Image 2026-04-28 at 12.34.22 PM.jpeg) to determine the full termination date. The OCR output shows only '1.' after 'as at'. Record the complete date and update the extraction artifact.

risk_flags.text: Low OCR confidence (0.65) may cause incorrect date extraction; human review of the original image is recommended.

summary: OCR-extracted text from NAP-SRC-0020 (a Notice to Quit) states termination as '1.' but the date is incomplete due to low OCR confidence (0.65). The termination date cannot be verified from this source alone.
